items.final_wording: Defines chest-pain scope in DHA telehealth and emphasises potentially life-threatening causes and emergency exclusion.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Chest Pain – 45
source.population: People presenting with chest pain; no precise age range is stated in the applicability section.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth chest-pain documentation; partial for a setting-agnostic GP workflow and emergency presentations excluded from telehealth.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines chest-pain scope in DHA telehealth and emphasises potentially life-threatening causes and emergency exclusion.

items.rationale: Supports mapped exertional, syncope, severe-pain, abnormal-vital, return, and escalation documentation.

items.final_wording: Limits testing to the assessed presentation and lists blood studies, chest radiography, ECG, and echocardiography where clinically indicated.

added_items.final_wording: Defines chest-pain scope in DHA telehealth and emphasises potentially life-threatening causes and emergency exclusion.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Chest Pain – 45
source.population: People presenting with chest pain; no precise age range is stated in the applicability section.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth chest-pain documentation; partial for a setting-agnostic GP workflow and emergency presentations excluded from telehealth.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines chest-pain scope in DHA telehealth and emphasises potentially life-threatening causes and emergency exclusion.

added_items.final_wording: Specifies onset, site, character, radiation, severity, exertional and relieving factors, associated symptoms, duration, trauma, travel, and prior testing.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Chest Pain – 45
source.population: People presenting with chest pain; no precise age range is stated in the applicability section.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth chest-pain documentation; partial for a setting-agnostic GP workflow and emergency presentations excluded from telehealth.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies onset, site, character, radiation, severity, exertional and relieving factors, associated symptoms, duration, trauma, travel, and prior testing.

added_items.rationale: Supports mapped chest-pain terms, symptom characteristics, associated symptoms, negatives, presets, and history.

added_items.final_wording: Lists life-threatening chest-pain patterns, associated breathlessness, syncope, diaphoresis, abnormal physiology, and emergency referral requirements.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Chest Pain – 45
source.population: People presenting with chest pain; no precise age range is stated in the applicability section.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth chest-pain documentation; partial for a setting-agnostic GP workflow and emergency presentations excluded from telehealth.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Lists life-threatening chest-pain patterns, associated breathlessness, syncope, diaphoresis, abnormal physiology, and emergency referral requirements.

added_items.rationale: Supports mapped exertional, syncope, severe-pain, abnormal-vital, return, and escalation documentation.

added_items.final_wording: Limits testing to the assessed presentation and lists blood studies, chest radiography, ECG, and echocardiography where clinically indicated.
